contact.body: Questions about our juices, booking us for your event, or interested in franchise opportunities? We'd love to hear from you.

review_carousel.body: Real reviews from our sugarcane lovers across the UK - and beyond!

reviews_events.body: From intimate Mehndi nights to 500-guest weddings - here's what our clients say.

cta_section.body: Have a question, want to book us for an event, or interested in franchise opportunities? We'd love to hear from you.

certifications.heading: Food Safety Registered & Fully Compliant
certifications.sub: Every event we attend comes with full documentation, insurance, and Food Safety Registered compliance. We take the trust of our clients and their guests very seriously.
certifications.visual_alt: The Cane House Food Hygiene Certificate

franchise_showcase.title: Franchise Opportunities
franchise_showcase.body: Be part of the fresh juice revolution. Bring the live-pressed cane experience to your city. Join our growing network of franchise partners across the UK.

franchise_why.title: Why The Cane House?
franchise_why.body: The demand for natural drinks is booming. The UK has almost no live-press sugarcane brand - yet. Be the first in your city.

events_why.title: What Makes Us Different
events_why.body: We're not just another catering option - we bring an experience that creates talking points and lasting memories for your guests.

events_quote.title: Request a Free Quote
events_quote.body: Tell us about your event and we'll come back to you within 24 hours with a personalised package and price.

quality_promise.title: What Makes The Cane House Different?
quality_promise.body: At The Cane House, we serve freshly pressed sugarcane juice and natural fruit blends that are prepared fresh for every customer. Our drinks offer a refreshing alternative to fizzy drinks and processed juices, bringing a traditional summer favourite enjoyed by millions to the heart of Sutton.

story_cards.heading: The Sugarcane Life Story
story_cards.subtext: From ancient fields to your cup - pressed live, served cool, every single time.

sugarcane_benefits.title: Why Sugarcane Juice is Loved Worldwide
sugarcane_benefits.body: From South Asian street corners to West African markets and Caribbean festivals, sugarcane juice is one of the few drinks that transcends every border, culture, and generation.

sugarcane_experience.title: Why We Miss India's Sugarcane
sugarcane_experience.subtitle: From street vendor to your glass - a taste of tradition

booking_wizard.heading: Book Your Order
booking_wizard.sub: Fresh cane juice, pressed live for your event. Pick your jugs, choose your flavours, and we'll take care of the rest.

franchise_enquiry.heading: Own a Cane House Franchise
franchise_enquiry.sub: Join a growing network of franchise partners. We'll walk you through every step - from site to launch.

faq.title: Common Queries
faq.body: Everything you need to know about our fresh {product_name} and services.

menu_builder.title: Build Your Juice
menu_builder.body: Mix and match size, variety, texture and flavour - pressed live, just for you.

event_type.title: Bring Us to Your Event
event_type.body: Elevate your celebration with our premium live-pressed {product_name} experience - perfect for weddings, Mehndi nights, Eid parties, Diwali celebrations, and corporate gatherings.

history_info.title: 10,000 Years of Sweet History
history_info.body: From a wild grass in New Guinea to the world's most traded commodity - the extraordinary journey of {product_short}.

page_hero_faqs.desc: Everything you need to know about {brand_name} - our juice, events, hire, and more.

page_hero_events.desc: Bring {brand_name} to your celebration. Live-pressed {product_name} - a unique, and unforgettable experience for your guests.

page_hero_franchise.heading: Franchise Opportunities
page_hero_franchise.desc: Join the UK's fastest-growing natural juice movement. Bring live-pressed {product_name} to your city - we provide everything you need to succeed.

page_hero_why_sugarcane.heading: Why {Product_short}?
page_hero_why_sugarcane.desc: {Product_short} has fuelled civilisations for over 2,000 years. Discover why fresh, live-pressed cane juice is the world's most natural energy drink - and why we're proud to bring it to the UK.

page_hero_blog.heading: Fresh Reads from {brand_name}
page_hero_blog.desc: Tips, recipes, and stories from South Asian juice culture.

page_hero_order_deliver.heading: Delivered Fresh to Your Door
page_hero_order_deliver.desc: Order our freshly pressed sugarcane juice for delivery. Select your items, tell us where and when - we'll handle the rest.

order_deliver_section.title: Order Fresh Juice, Delivered
order_deliver_section.body: Place a delivery request and our team will confirm all details directly with you - freshly pressed, no additives, right to your door.

order_deliver_cta.heading: Fresh Juice at Your Doorstep
order_deliver_cta.body: It takes under 2 minutes. Select your items, drop your address, and we'll be in touch.
